name: A Note For Yourself

options.label: [Take and Give]
effects: Receive a card that you had stored previously, and store a card in your deck in return.
First encounter in save file: Iron Wave is stored by default.

notes: This event can store a card between runs, allows obtaining cards from different characters.
On A14 or lower: Must have beaten that Ascension level on chosen character to encounter.
On A15 or higher: This event cannot be encountered.
Playing the Daily Climb also disables this event.
Upgraded cards and Searing Blow upgrade levels are preserved when stored.
Retrieving a card triggers relics: Molten Egg, Toxic Egg, Frozen Egg, Ceramic Fish.
raw_options:
[Take and Give] Receive and Store a Card
• Receive a card that you had stored previously, and store a card in your deck in return.
The first time the player encounters this event in their save file, it will have  Iron Wave stored.
• The first time the player encounters this event in their save file, it will have  Iron Wave stored.
[Ignore] Nothing happens.


You are then given the option to [Leave].
raw_dialogue:
You spot a loose brick within a pillar that catches your eye.
You find a folded note and a card inside. It reads,
"The Heart awaits"
This is your handwriting.
[Take and Give]


Choose a Card to Store.


Prior to [Leave]


"What is going on?"

name: Bonfire Spirits

options.label: [Offer]
options.description: Receive a reward based on the offer.
effects: Offer a card in your deck to remove. The reward you receive depends on the rarity of the card you give.

notes: This event is one of those that treats Basic cards as a lower quality than Common.
Obtaining  Spirit Poop adds the Poopy Score bonus which lowers your total score by one.
raw_options:
[Offer] Receive a reward based on the offer.
• Offer a card in your deck to remove. The reward you receive depends on the rarity of the card you give.
raw_dialogue:
You happen upon what looks like a group of purple fire spirits dancing around a large bonfire.
Before selecting [Offer]


The spirits toss small bones and fragments into the fire, which brilliantly erupts each time.
As you approach, the spirits all turn to you, expectantly...


[Offer]


You toss an offering into the bonfire.
When offering a Basic card


Nothing happens...
The spirits seem to be ignoring you now. Disappointing...


When offering a Common card


The flames grow slightly brighter.
The spirits continue dancing. You feel slightly warmer from their presence..
You heal 5 HP.


When offering an Uncommon card


The flames erupt, growing significantly stronger!
The spirits dance around you excitedly, filling you with a sense of warmth.
You are healed to full HP.


When offering a Rare card


The flames burst, nearly knocking you off your feet, as the fire doubles in strength.
The spirits dance around you excitedly before merging into your form, filling you with warmth and strength.
Your Max HP increases by 10 and you are healed to full HP.


When offering a Curse


However, the spirits aren't happy you offered a Curse...
The card fizzles a meek black smoke. You receive a... something in return.
(Gives  Spirit Poop)

name: Duplicator

options.label: [Pray]
options.description: Duplicate a card in your deck.

raw_options:
[Pray] Duplicate a card in your deck.
[Leave] Nothing happens.
raw_dialogue:
Before you lies a decorated altar to some ancient entity.

[Pray]

You kneel respectfully. A ghastly mirror image appears from the shrine and collides into you.


[Leave]

You ignore the shrine, confident in your choice.

name: Golden Shrine

options.label: [Desecrate]
effects: Regret -  Unplayable. At the end of your turn, lose HP equal to the number of cards in your hand.

raw_options:
[Pray] Gain 100 Gold.
[Desecrate] Gain 275 Gold. Become Cursed -  Regret.
• Regret -  Unplayable. At the end of your turn, lose HP equal to the number of cards in your hand.
[Leave] Nothing happens.
raw_dialogue:
Before you lies an elaborate shrine to an ancient spirit.

[Pray]

As your hand touches the shrine, gold rains from the ceiling showering you in riches.


[Desecrate]

Each time you strike the shrine, gold pours forth again and again! 
As you pocket the riches, something weighs heavily on you.


[Leave]

You ignore the shrine.

name: Lab

options.label: [Search]
effects: Opens a rewards menu with three (two 15) random Potions. These can be skipped.

raw_options:
[Search] Find some Potions!
• Opens a rewards menu with three (two 15) random Potions. These can be skipped.
raw_dialogue:
You find yourself in a room filled with racks of test tubes, beakers, flasks, forceps, pinch clamps, stirring rods, tongs, goggles funnels, pipets, cylinders, condensers, and even a rare spiral tube of glass. 
Why do you know the names of all these tools? It doesn't matter, you take a look around.

name: Match and Keep

minigame.simulation_note: For AI simulation, treat as probabilistic: expected ~2-3 matches with random play, skilled play can match all 6

options.label: [Play]
options.description: Play a memory matching game for cards.

notes: Match pairs of cards to add them to your deck
12 cards total, 6 pairs, 5 attempts to flip
Always includes 1 Colorless card pair and 1 Curse pair
raw_options:
[Play]
• Play a matching game for cards. Match pairs of cards to add them to your deck. There is always a pair of one Colorless card and one Curse.
raw_dialogue:
A gremlin is madly shuffling cards on a table. This monster seems to be a harmless one. You approach him out of curiosity.

Before selecting [Play]

"Twelve cards! Match them to keep them! Five tries, no do-overs. 
Are you ready? Let's start!"


After [Play]

You complete the gremlin's game and look up. 
He disappeared?

name: Ominous Forge

options.label: [Forge]
options.description: Upgrade a card in your deck.

options.label: [Rummage]
options.description: Obtain a special relic. Become Cursed -  Pain.
effects: Warped Tongs - At the start of your turn,  Upgrade a random card in your hand for the rest of combat.
Pain -  Unplayable. While in hand, lose 1 HP whenever you play another card.

raw_options:
[Forge] Upgrade a card in your deck.

[Rummage] Obtain a special relic. Become Cursed -  Pain.
• Warped Tongs - At the start of your turn,  Upgrade a random card in your hand for the rest of combat.
• Pain -  Unplayable. While in hand, lose 1 HP whenever you play another card.
[Leave] Nothing happens.
raw_dialogue:
You duck inside a small hut. Inside you find what appears to be a forge. The smithing tools are covered with dust, yet a fire roars inside the furnace. You feel on edge...

[Forge]

You decide to put the forge to use and... 
CLANG CLAAANG CLANG! 
...improve your arsenal!


[Rummage]

You decide to see if you can find anything of use. After uncovering tarps, looking through boxes, and checking nooks and crannies, you find a dust covered relic! 
Taking the relic, you can't shake a sudden feeling of sharp pain as you exit the hut. Maybe you disturbed some sort of spirit?


[Leave]

There doesn't seem to be anything of use. You exit the way you came, the flames of the furnace casting eerie shadows on the walls inside the hut...

name: Purifier

options.label: [Pray]
options.description: Remove a card from your deck.

notes: This probably would not work as an air purifier.
raw_options:
[Pray] Remove a card from your deck.
[Leave] Nothing happens.
raw_dialogue:
Before you lies an elaborate shrine to a forgotten spirit. 
[Pray]


 As you kneel in reverence, you feel a weight lifted off your shoulders.


[Leave]


 You ignore the shrine.

name: The Divine Fountain

options.label: [Drink]
options.description: Remove all Curses from your deck.

notes: Removing all Curses may not be beneficial if you are relying on the  Strength from  Du-Vu Doll.
The Max HP gain from  Darkstone Periapt is kept even when the Curses are removed.
raw_options:
[Drink] Remove all Curses from your deck.
[Leave] Nothing happens.
raw_dialogue:
You come across shimmering water flowing endlessly from a fountain on a nearby wall.

[Drink]

As you drink the water, you feel a dark grasp loosen.


[Leave]

Unsure of the nature of this water, you continue on your way, parched.

name: The Woman in Blue
notes: Even if you skip grabbing the potions you bought, she will still be satisfied.
raw_options:
[Buy 1 Potion] 20 Gold.
[Buy 2 Potions] 30 Gold.
[Buy 3 Potions] 40 Gold.
[Leave] Nothing happens.
raw_dialogue:
From the darkness, an arm pulls you into a small shop. As your eyes adjust, you see a pale woman in sharp clothes gesturing to a wall of potions. 
"Buy a potion. Now!" she states.

[Buy] any amount of potions

"Good. Now leave." 
You exit the shop cautiously.


[Leave]

WHAM 
Her gloved fist collides with your face, nearly knocking you off your feet. 
"Get out before I litter the floor with your guts." You take her word and exit with your guts still safely in your body.

name: Transmogrifier

options.label: [Pray]
effects: Read more on Transform rules here.

raw_options:
[Pray]  Transform a card.
• Read more on Transform rules here.
[Leave] Nothing happens.
raw_dialogue:
Before you lies an elaborate shrine to a forgotten spirit.

[Pray]

As the power of the shrine flows through you, your mind feels altered.


[Leave]

You ignore the shrine.

name: Upgrade Shrine
raw_dialogue:
Before you lies an elaborate shrine to a forgotten spirit.

[Pray]

The shrine's energy flows into you, making you stronger.


[Leave]

You ignore the shrine.

name: We Meet Again!

options.label: [Give Potion]
options.description: Lose a chosen potion. Obtain a Relic.
effects: The event will randomly choose a potion upon entry and tell you which one was selected. You will be unable to drink or discard that potion until you leave the event's floor.

options.label: [Give Gold]
effects: The amount of Gold lost is between 50 and 150 (or your current amount of Gold).

options.label: [Give Card]
options.description: Lose a chosen card. Obtain a Relic.
effects: The chosen card will not be Basic or a Curse.

notes: "mask wearing hoodlums" likely refers to the group of bandits in the Act 2 event  Masked Bandits.
raw_options:
[Give Potion] Lose a chosen potion. Obtain a Relic.
• The event will randomly choose a potion upon entry and tell you which one was selected. You will be unable to drink or discard that potion until you leave the event's floor.
[Give Gold] Lose Gold. Obtain a Relic.
• The amount of Gold lost is between 50 and 150 (or your current amount of Gold).
[Give Card] Lose a chosen card. Obtain a Relic.
• The chosen card will not be Basic or a Curse.
[Attack] Nothing happens.
raw_dialogue:
"We meet again!" 
A cheery disheveled fellow approaches you gleefully. You do not know this man. 
"It's me! Ranwid! Have any goods for me today? The usual? A fella like me can't make it alone, you know?" 
You eye him suspiciously and consider your options.



[Give Potion]

"Exquisite! Was feeling parched." 
Glup glup glup 
He downs the potion in one go and lets out a satisfied burp. 


[Give Gold]

"Magnificent! This will be quite handy if I run into those mask wearing hoodlums again."


[Give Card]

"Exemplary! I shall study this further in my chambers."


He rummages around in his various pockets... 
"Here, look what I've got for you today! Take it take it!"


[Attack]

"Aaaaagghh!! What a jerk you are sometimes!" 
He runs away.

name: Wheel of Change

options.label: [Play]
options.description: Spin the wheel for a random outcome.
effects: Spin a wheel containing 6 equally-weighted outcomes:
random_outcomes: Remove a card from your deck
Take 10% (A15+: 15%) of Max HP as damage

notes: All 6 outcomes have equal probability (1/6 each).
raw_options:
Spin Button.
  Wheel arrow.
[Play]
• Spin a wheel containing the following "prizes":
Gain Gold
Gain a random Relic
Heal to full HP
Become Cursed -  Decay
Remove a card from your deck.
Take 10% (15% 15) of your Max HP as damage.
• Gain Gold
• Gain a random Relic
• Heal to full HP
• Become Cursed -  Decay
• Remove a card from your deck.
• Take 10% (15% 15) of your Max HP as damage.
raw_dialogue:
You come upon a dapper looking, cheery gremlin. 
"It's time to spin the wheel! Are you R E A D Y ? Of course you are!"



When receiving a Relic

"Ah, a gift! 
Enjoy!"


When taking damage

"Uh oh! 
You lose!" 
You spot him readying a shiv...


You slash at the crazy gremlin but he's simply too quick! 
He gets you a few times with a crude shiv. 
"The price has been paid!!" 
and with that, both the gremlin and its wheel disappear in a puff of smoke.


When obtaining Gold

"You win some GOLD! 
YAY!!!!"


When obtaining  Decay

"Looks like you won a Curse! 
That's not good. 
Oh well! Better luck next time!"


When removing a card from your deck

"Ohh, the power of darkness... 
Choose a card to remove from your deck!"
